reviews.review_msg: She teaches well, gives good feedback. Do contact her office hours for extra feedback.

Dr. Tammara Soma is a very genuine and kind professor. She truly cares for her students well-beings and wants them to do well in the course. She is very passionate about the course, which made the lectures engaging and easy to understand. Overall, the course content was very intriguing, and I would love to have her as a professor again.
a really great class to take, learned so much about sdg and it really sparked a career interest for me as a business student

Lectures are fun and she seems to really care about students despite this being an online course. Heavy workload though. Expect to do a lot of readings each week and though there are few assignments, they're pretty large assignments. Quizzes feel like they're meant to trick you. TA marking for assignments are SUPER high in expectation.

Super friendly, understanding, and benevolent professor! There are many chances for extra credit and often extensions on assignments. Content and quizzes are fair and easy. As long as you pay attention to lectures, the information is pretty intuitive. Attendance and participation in lecture and tutorial are thus super important!!

She is a very easy going prof and is very passionate/caring. Tutorials are a little boring but overall it's a free A. Assignments are overall easy to follow. Just make sure you pay attention to when she's emphasizing something during lecture cuz it might be on the quizzes. Overall, interesting class and Dr. T is very outgoing.
Wonderful professor and moreover, a wonderful person. She is a nice, kind, knowledgeable and sincere person by nature.

I took this course as an elective in the summer of 2024 and would recommend it to everyone. Just follow the rubric/instructions for each assignment, and you will definitely do well! The TAs are tough graders tho!

Not sure why people are giving such good rating to this prof. Took this class as an elective and ended up being more harder than courses from my major. Such tough grading and the feedback never made sense. There were no proper guidlines and format provided for assignments either. Never take a class with this prof. Worst course, prof, and TA's ever.
Engaging, and dedicated to teaching her students so that everyone gets the most out of her class.
